title: felicia odorata
intro: Felicia odorata, also known as blue felicia or felicia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. It is a popular medicinal plant that has been used for centuries to treat various health issues. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions. Felicia odorata is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide health benefits such as relieving stress, improving sleep, and boosting the immune system.
